---
title: "PDF"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---


::: {.panel-tabset}
## Thesis

<div class="responsive-pdf">
  <embed src="complete_thesis.pdf" type="application/pdf">
</div>

:::


<style>
  /* hide the description */
.description {
    display: none;
}

/* Responsive PDF container for more vertical documents */
.responsive-pdf {
    position: relative;
    padding-bottom: 90%; /* More vertical aspect ratio */
    height: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    max-width: 100%;
    background: #f0f0f0;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
}

.responsive-pdf embed {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
}
</style>
